EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITopologyNode

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to information on a topological node within a topology graph.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D04B7154-4989-11D5-9FE9-00C04F6BDD7F")]
public interface ITopologyNode : ITopologyElement

Properties

Degree

The number of edges entering and leaving this node. Closed edges are counted twice.

int Degree { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Edges[bool]

The set of topological edges incident on this node.

IEnumNodeEdge Edges[bool clockwise] { get; }

Parameters

clockwise bool

Property Value

IEnumNodeEdge

Examples

Sample Snippet

Geometry 

IGeometry Geometry { get; }

Property Value

IGeometry

IsDegreeKnown

Indicates if the degree of this node is known. Nodes constructed from edges that are partially outside the build extent have unknown degrees.

bool IsDegreeKnown { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsDeleted 

bool IsDeleted { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsSelected 

bool IsSelected { get; }

Property Value

bool

Parents 

IEnumTopologyParent Parents { get; }

Property Value

IEnumTopologyParent

Visited 

bool Visited { get; set; }

bool
